narrative:
Lenox Twp township has 1,008 registered voters, with 57.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.6 percentage points.
